workflow.name: KDBP Product Requirements Document
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_kdbp/core/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
COLLABORATIVE PM PEER — facilitator, not content generator
Output: Single prd.md built progressively through all steps
A/P/C MENUS: After each major content section, offer [A]dvanced Elicitation, [P]arty Mode, [C]ontinue
CAPABILITY CONTRACT: Functional Requirements (Step 7) bind ALL downstream work
DBP BOOKEND PATTERN: Step 0 loads behaviors. Step 9 records session ledger.

step.goal: Load behavior values into hot tier
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-behavior-load.md

step.goal: Initialize workflow — detect continuation, discover input docs
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-init.md

step.goal: Project discovery, product vision, and executive summary
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-discovery.md

step.goal: Success criteria and product scope negotiation
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-success.md

step.goal: Narrative user journey mapping for all user types
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-journeys.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-advanced.md

step.goal: Project-type deep dive and scoping exercise
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-strategy.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-functional.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-nonfunctional.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-09-completion.md
